children.name: div
children.textContent: 📍 From your photo: Construction site on 5th Ave

children.name: div
children.textContent: Scaffolding needs diagonal braces because triangles are the strongest shape in construction. When you push on a triangle, force spreads evenly to all three sides. A rectangle without diagonals would wobble and collapse under pressure.

children.name: div
children.textContent: 🧩 Think of it like a chair — four legs wobble, but add an X brace between them and it becomes solid instantly.

children.name: div
children.textContent: A framework of beams forming triangles for structural support

children.name: div
children.textContent: Force that pushes or squeezes a structural member inward

children.name: div
children.textContent: How weight is spread across connected structural elements
